title: alismataceae
intro: The Alismataceae rank is a family of aquatic plants, commonly known as the water-plantain or arrowhead family. This family consists of approximately 120 species, primarily found in freshwater and brackish environments worldwide. Alismataceae plants are characterized by their distinctive leaves and flowers, often adapted for life submerged or floating on water. Examples of plants within this family include the American arrowhead and the common water-plantain.
